title: Kwandenkosi Foundation hosts seminar to heal broken hearts
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Kwandenkosi Foundation held a powerful community seminar at the uMasizakhe Community Hall on Saturday 11 November, under the theme “Tears of a Broken Woman in our Society”.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Kwandenkosi Foundation held a powerful community seminar at the uMasizakhe Community Hall on Saturday 11 November, under the theme “Tears of a Broken Woman in our Society”."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event drew church leaders and community members who came together to reflect on personal struggles, healing, and hope."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Addressing brokenness","html":"Addressing brokenness"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Guest speakers were Rev Mankayi, Noluthando Jacobs, Vuyokazi Grootboom and Xoliswa Nkonyeni.","html":"Guest speakers were Rev Mankayi, Noluthando Jacobs, Vuyokazi Grootboom and Xoliswa Nkonyeni."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The speakers shared moving stories about overcoming emotional pain and the importance of addressing the different forms of brokenness - emotional, physical, and spiritual.","html":"The speakers shared moving stories about overcoming emotional pain and the importance of addressing the different forms of brokenness - emotional, physical, and spiritual."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rev Mziyanda Noqayi and his wife, Nomathamsanqa, highlighted the need for open dialogue and support.","html":"Rev Mziyanda Noqayi and his wife, Nomathamsanqa, highlighted the need for open dialogue and support."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“By sharing your story and providing a supportive community, you can help others heal and find hope. The foundation can be a beacon of light for those navigating dark times,” said Noqayi.","html":"“By sharing your story and providing a supportive community, you can help others heal and find hope. The foundation can be a beacon of light for those navigating dark times,” said Noqayi."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Personal tragedy","html":"Personal tragedy"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Kwandenkosi Foundation was born out of personal tragedy after the Noqayi family experienced the heartbreaking loss of their baby, who passed away at just nine days old.","html":"The Kwandenkosi Foundation was born out of personal tragedy after the Noqayi family experienced the heartbreaking loss of their baby, who passed away at just nine days old."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Through this pain, the family was inspired to create a space that offers compassion and understanding to others dealing with similar grief and emotional challenges.","html":"Through this pain, the family was inspired to create a space that offers compassion and understanding to others dealing with similar grief and emotional challenges."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Healing","html":"Healing"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Today, the foundation is dedicated to helping men and women heal from trauma, rediscover their strength, and rebuild their lives.","html":"Today, the foundation is dedicated to helping men and women heal from trauma, rediscover their strength, and rebuild their lives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Its mission is to provide emotional and psychological support, helping individuals regain stability, reconnect with their values and passions, and develop a renewed sense of self.","html":"Its mission is to provide emotional and psychological support, helping individuals regain stability, reconnect with their values and passions, and develop a renewed sense of self."}]

images.alt: Kwandenkosi Foundation hosts seminar to heal broken hearts
